edge_hypothesis: Supertrend direction flips are adaptive trend-change signals with built-in ATR-based noise filtering. Unlike EMA crossovers which use fixed periods, Supertrend self-adjusts its trailing level to current volatility. ADX > 25 gate ensures only strong trends are traded, avoiding the ranging regime that produced PF 0.77-0.88 losses in ema_rsi_atr. The signal fires once per genuine trend reversal rather than continuously oscillating like RSI confirmation.
regime_assumption: Trending markets only (ADX > 25). Invalidates in ranging/choppy regimes where Supertrend whipsaws. Expected to underperform when ADX < 20.

variants.name: supertrend_strict_trend
variants.description: Supertrend direction flip with strict ADX > 25 trending gate. Asymmetric payoff: 1.5:1 R:R minimum. Designed for strong trend capture on 1h timeframe.
entry_long: Require SUPERTd_7_3.0 direction flip from -1 to +1 on bar close.
Require ADX_14 > 25 to confirm strong trending regime.
entry_short: Require SUPERTd_7_3.0 direction flip from +1 to -1 on bar close.
Require ADX_14 > 25 to confirm strong trending regime.
filters: Backtester executable indicators: EMA, SMA, RSI, ATR, MACD, Bollinger Bands, Stochastic, ADX, CCI, Williams %R, OBV, VWAP, Ichimoku, Supertrend, Donchian Channels.
exit_rules: Exit on opposite Supertrend direction flip.
Exit on ADX_14 dropping below 20 (regime invalidation).
Exit on max bars in trade threshold (20 bars).
Hypothesis failure mode guard: Whipsaw in low-ADX consolidation
Hypothesis failure mode guard: Late entry after extended trend run
risk_rules: Risk note: risk per trade target is 1%.
Stop loss at 2.0x ATR_14 from entry (wider to accommodate trend volatility).
Take profit at 3.0x ATR_14 from entry (asymmetric 1.5:1 R:R).
Regime invalidation: exit if ADX_14 < 20 regardless of P&L.

components.notes: SUPERTd_7_3.0 direction flip as primary entry signal

variants.name: supertrend_let_winners_run
variants.description: Supertrend with looser ADX gate (>20) and wider TP target (4.0x ATR). Hypothesis: trend-following edge comes from few large winners, so let trades run further with trailing-style exits.
entry_long: Require SUPERTd_7_3.0 direction flip from -1 to +1 on bar close.
Require ADX_14 > 20 to confirm trending regime.
entry_short: Require SUPERTd_7_3.0 direction flip from +1 to -1 on bar close.
Require ADX_14 > 20 to confirm trending regime.
filters: Backtester executable indicators: EMA, SMA, RSI, ATR, MACD, Bollinger Bands, Stochastic, ADX, CCI, Williams %R, OBV, VWAP, Ichimoku, Supertrend, Donchian Channels.
exit_rules: Exit on opposite Supertrend direction flip.
Exit on ADX_14 dropping below 15 (deep regime invalidation).
Exit on max bars in trade threshold (30 bars).
Hypothesis failure mode guard: Whipsaw in low-ADX consolidation
Hypothesis failure mode guard: Extended adverse excursion in volatile trend
risk_rules: Risk note: risk per trade target is 1%.
Stop loss at 2.5x ATR_14 from entry (wide to let winners breathe).
Take profit at 4.0x ATR_14 from entry (1.6:1 R:R, capture full trend leg).

components.notes: SUPERTd_7_3.0 direction flip as primary entry signal

variants.name: supertrend_btc_calibrated
variants.description: BTC-specific Supertrend with 3.0x ATR stop to accommodate BTC's 10-20x larger drawdowns vs ETH. Evidence: prior BTC specs with 1.5x ATR stop had drawdown 981 — need structurally wider risk band.
entry_long: Require SUPERTd_7_3.0 direction flip from -1 to +1 on bar close.
Require ADX_14 > 25 to confirm strong trending regime.
entry_short: Require SUPERTd_7_3.0 direction flip from +1 to -1 on bar close.
Require ADX_14 > 25 to confirm strong trending regime.
filters: Backtester executable indicators: EMA, SMA, RSI, ATR, MACD, Bollinger Bands, Stochastic, ADX, CCI, Williams %R, OBV, VWAP, Ichimoku, Supertrend, Donchian Channels.
Asset calibration: BTC requires wider stops due to higher absolute volatility
exit_rules: Exit on opposite Supertrend direction flip.
Exit on ADX_14 dropping below 20 (regime invalidation).
Exit on max bars in trade threshold (25 bars).
Hypothesis failure mode guard: Whipsaw in low-ADX consolidation
Hypothesis failure mode guard: BTC flash crash exceeding stop
risk_rules: Risk note: risk per trade target is 0.75% (reduced for BTC volatility).
Stop loss at 3.0x ATR_14 from entry (BTC-calibrated wide stop).
Take profit at 4.5x ATR_14 from entry (1.5:1 R:R).
Asset-specific: BTC drawdowns historically 10-20x larger than ETH at same ATR mult.

components.notes: SUPERTd_7_3.0 direction flip as primary entry signal
